title: neltuma mezcalana
side_effects: Neltuma mezcalana can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure due to its stimulant properties, which may lead to cardiovascular issues. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also cause gastrointestinal problems like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, improper use of neltuma mezcalana may result in allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and respiratory distress. Furthermore, its psychoactive properties can lead to anxiety, paranoia, and disorientation if not used responsibly.
